item.title: Every third of his guests is gold.
item.description: Amy Goodman and Jon Steward in a real good talk. Amy Goodman, is host and executive producer of “Democracy Now!” and subject of the new documentary "STEAL THIS STORY, PLEASE!" Together, they examine which stories get told and why, discuss the bargain the media makes in trading truth for access, and explore the power ordinary people still possess to organize and fight back — even as attacks on our democracy intensify. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fHonUeO_ePU
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: Memes vol 696 Movies

I’m cheating and this one includes tv too
He looks like Peter Griffin
Jurassic Park
Dead poets society
He was a theater kid and he knows how to tap dance. I am hopelessly enamored with him
Project Hail Mary
Scott Pilgrim
Idk what this is but that’s Kyle gallner
Dinner in America
The Batman
Sinners
“SAMMMYYYYYYYY”
X-men
Wake up dead man
West side story
LotR
Teen beach movie
Star Wars
Stranger things
He-man. Hey does the new movie have squinks in it
West side story
Me
Little miss sunshine
A knight of the seven kingdoms
Heated rivalry
Challengers
Stand by me
Brokeback mountain
Gertie tax

item.title: Memes vol 695
item.description:
And it started… never mind
I’ve got a basketball and a dancing Latino in my room each night
Me as a kid. That’s right- I was a big ass bug
So I saved this but the part it said was mean and I don’t feel that way so I blurred it out but now it doesn’t make sense but like it’s a a mile Faist meme and I don’t come across those very often and also I just love this picture of him so I mean I could have just posted this picture but it’s a Mike Faist meme. As previously stated. Can you tell I’m not doing very well.
Me
Bruce and Gertie tax
Big Mama tax
Nessie tax

item.title: Another qualified, patriotic young professional
item.description: According to insider sources, Elias Irizarry, 24 yo, was hired to work in a Pentagon office that "oversees special operations" which is among the most sensitive work the Military does. He is the son of actor Vincent Irizarry and Avalon House. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/national-security/jan-6-defendant-said-was-ashamed-foolish-actions-now-works-pentagon-rcna348183 https://youtu.be/uV1_0pHA4nE?t=330
item.dc:creator: CaptainBackPain

item.title: GovBrief Today #490
item.description: Andrea Pedro-Francisco walked out of ICE detention on Wednesday still suffering from an ovarian cyst the size of a lime, four months after agents arrested her in Minnesota and jailed her in Texas. She got out alive for one reason: a senator called a Trump official and asked. The next day, ICE stopped reporting deaths that occur within a month of release. Advocates accuse it of hiding those deaths by freeing the dying just before the end. The ones with no senator lobbying the White House for them are the ones ICE now doesn't have to answer for. I've emailed 7,695 stories over 490 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260604-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/house-ukraine [2] https://go.govbrief.today/kushner-albania [3] https://go.govbrief.today/diaz-canel-sanction [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june4 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fda-abortion-pill [6] https://go.govbrief.today/montana-bears [7] https://go.govbrief.today/coal-700m [8] https://go.govbrief.today/tyco-pfas [9] https://go.govbrief.today/scott-ye [10] https://go.govbrief.today/federalize-ai [11] https://go.govbrief.today/pulte-temporary [12] https://go.govbrief.today/bolton-deal [13] https://go.govbrief.today/paramedics-retried [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-deaths [15] https://go.govbrief.today/arch-commission [16] https://go.govbrief.today/fund-senate [17] https://go.govbrief.today/reflectingpool-meme [18] https://go.govbrief.today/folds-nso [19] https://go.govbrief.today/kenctr-name [20] https://go.govbrief.today/lincoln-promenade [21] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-donors [22] https://go.govbrief.today/pedrofrancisco-released Epstein Timeline: https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-crimes Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1708 (escaped containment)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Yeah this tracks.
"Hey it's this guy in the red jeep that always says hello to us"
A study showed that women scared off birds at a greater distance than men did. Nobody is sure why. One theory latched onto by rage incels was that birds see in ultraviolet and "makeup looks even more terrifying in UV than real light" but that seems unlikely to me: I think it's more manosphere nonsense. Though my idea isn't much better: maybe it's differences between how men and women walk?
Ottomans be crazy, man
Also my day, too.
This is especially hilarious to me because I am literally reading the Jennifer Ackerman book about owls right now.
They're all good warblers, bront.
*archaeologist, but yeah.
Woodhouse's Scrub-jays imitate rattlesnakes.
Yeah I believe it.
For the last....whole of my life basically
He won't say much, all the alcohol has been removed.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Thank you. Pippin." ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: 8 years as the Free Meal Lady.
item.description: 8 years ago today, I just wanted to share a hot meal with the kids in my village for my 25th birthday. It was also my way of thanking God for giving me the job I had been praying for. I simply wanted to share it with the IMG community, like a “day in the life” kind of thing. Until the post garnered hundreds of thousands of views, and people kept asking for my PayPal, which I didn’t even recognize at the time. Some were asking for Venmo and a GoFundMe link, and I wasn’t entirely aware of what those were either. Donations kept pouring in to the point that my PayPal account was flagged for fraud or money laundering. Up until now, I’m still banned from using PayPal, which is why my aunt lends me hers. People on IMG were very skeptical and called me a scammer. I almost gave up, but some people believed in me. Someone introduced me to Patreon, and it has been my main channel since 2020, two years after I started posting good deeds, meal days, and everything else I could think of to help the people in my community. The term “content creation” didn’t really exist back then. Or maybe I just wasn’t aware that it was called content creation, and that I was already a content creator. 8 years ago, went by so fast. Every year, my birthday reminds me why I started this in the first place. And I want to continue helping people in every way possible, whether big or small. So this post is to celebrate my birthday, my 8th anniversary, and life with the people from this platform who have become a part of me. I am here because you believed in me. So thank you. Thank you for believing. Happy birthday to me. Happy 8 years to us. 2 more years, and it will be a decade. ❤️ From 25 to 33 real quick. ————————————————————— To anyone who wants to sponsor a meal, Im still doing it and still the same payment channels on my bio. ❤️ patreon.com/TheFreeMeaLady ojcallope17@gmail.com PayPal.
item.dc:creator: TheFreeMeaLLady
